title: Stipa elmeri
taxonomy: Stipa elmeri is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Stipa, which consists of various species of grasses commonly known as feather grasses or hair grasses. The family Poaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that includes many types of grasses and other related species. The classification of Stipa elmeri is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its slender stems and delicate foliage. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this species.
